categories.title: Biometrics
categories.condition: Use must be permitted under relevant Union or national law

subcategories.description: Remote biometric identification systems. Excludes biometric verification whose sole purpose is confirming a person is who they claim to be.
Biometric categorisation systems that categorise by sensitive or protected attributes or characteristics based on inference of those attributes.
Emotion recognition systems.
AI used as safety components in the management and operation of critical digital infrastructure, road traffic, or supply of water, gas, heating, or electricity.
Determining access or admission or assigning persons to educational and vocational training institutions at all levels.
Evaluating learning outcomes, including when used to steer the learning process.
Assessing the appropriate level of education an individual will receive or can access.
Monitoring and detecting prohibited behaviour of students during tests.

categories.title: Employment, workers management, and access to self-employment

subcategories.description: Recruitment or selection: placing targeted job ads, analysing or filtering applications, evaluating candidates.
Decisions affecting terms of work: promotion, termination, task allocation based on individual behaviour or traits, monitoring and evaluating performance.

categories.title: Access to and enjoyment of essential private and public services

subcategories.description: Evaluating eligibility for essential public assistance benefits and services, or granting, reducing, revoking, or reclaiming such benefits.
Evaluating creditworthiness or establishing credit scores of natural persons. Excludes AI used solely for detecting financial fraud.
Risk assessment and pricing for natural persons in life and health insurance.
Evaluating and classifying emergency calls or dispatching and prioritising emergency first response services; emergency healthcare patient triage.

categories.title: Law enforcement
categories.condition: Use must be permitted under relevant Union or national law

subcategories.description: Assessing the risk of a natural person becoming a victim of criminal offences.
Polygraphs or similar tools used by or for law enforcement.
Evaluating the reliability of evidence during investigation or prosecution.
Assessing risk of offending or re-offending; assessing personality traits or past criminal behaviour.
Profiling of natural persons in detection, investigation, or prosecution of criminal offences.

categories.title: Migration, asylum, and border control management
categories.condition: Use must be permitted under relevant Union or national law

subcategories.description: Polygraphs or similar tools used by competent public authorities in migration and border context.
Assessing security risk, irregular migration risk, or health risk posed by persons entering or having entered a Member State.
Assisting examination of asylum, visa, or residence permit applications.
Detecting, recognising, or identifying natural persons in migration, asylum, and border control context. Excludes verification of travel documents.

categories.title: Administration of justice and democratic processes

subcategories.description: Assisting judicial authorities in researching and interpreting facts and law, applying law to facts; similar use in alternative dispute resolution.

Influencing the outcome of an election or referendum, or the voting behaviour of persons. Excludes tools for organising and optimising political campaigns from an administrative or logistical point of view.
